argv: import json,sys;from pathlib import Path;root=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI');text=(root/'core'/'foxai_web.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8');markers=['REPAIR_BAY_CALM_GUIDED_V1_4_START','Ready for a safe check','Check My Computer','Run a Deeper Check','Show scan details','Self-Repair Bay — Advanced','repairCalmViewModel','renderRepairCalmView','Nothing repairs itself silently'];assert all(m in text for m in markers),[m for m in markers if m not in text];section=text.split('<section id=repair class=page>',1)[1].split('</section>',1)[0];assert section.index('repairCalmShell') < section.index('repairSimpleDetails') < section.index('repairAdvancedView');sys.path.insert(0,str(root));from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_repair_bay_scan;r=run_repair_bay_scan(root,mode='quick',context={'validation':'v1_4_calm_guided_live_smoke'});s=r.get('safety') or {};assert r.get('read_only') is True,r;assert s.get('network_used') is False,s;assert s.get('commands_run') is False,s;assert int(s.get('files_written') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('repairs_applied') or 0)==0,s;print(json.dumps({'REPAIR_BAY_V1_4_LIVE_OK':True,'checks':(r.get('summary') or {}).get('checks'),'headline':(r.get('summary') or {}).get('headline'),'calm_default':True,'self_repair_advanced':True},indent=2))
